changelog.title: Content Buckets
changelog.desc: Tag content cards by topic or offer and see patterns over time. Which formats work best for which products? Now you can find out. Add your own buckets, tag cards as you create them, and see a visual breakdown right above your kanban.

changelog.title: New Landing Page
changelog.desc: The login screen is now a full landing page so new visitors actually know what they're logging into. Includes a video walkthrough, screenshot carousel, and the analog + AI positioning front and centre.

changelog.title: Sales Page Glow-Up
changelog.desc: The features breakdown is now colour-coded by section. Create & Write in rust, Plan & Organise in teal, Guides in rust. Section labels are bold pill badges instead of flat rules. Each card has a coloured icon background.

changelog.title: The Analog Way Added to Guides
changelog.desc: The fourth guide is now visible in the Built-in Guides section of the sales page. What analog actually means, why it's having a moment, and how to use the Studio as a fully analog creator, no AI required.

changelog.title: What's New Popup Fixed
changelog.desc: The update notification now fires after your account loads, not before. This means it correctly shows for every account independently and won't stay silently dismissed across different users on the same device.

changelog.title: Mobile Improvements
changelog.desc: Content Planner now scrolls properly on mobile with the Bucket Insights strip visible. Landing page bridge card stacks correctly on small screens. Bucket manage button scaled for touch.
